videos.headline: Louisiana tops GA Southern after wild 4th quarter
videos.description: Georgia Southern takes the lead after fumbling a would-be touchdown, but ultimately Louisiana comes out on top with a game-winning field goal.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Louisiana tops GA Southern after wild 4th quarter) 2020/9/26 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Kennedy's 61-yard reception sets up GA Southern TD
videos.description: Shai Werts hits Wesley Kennedy III in stride for a 61-yard gain, and a few plays later J.D. King runs in the two-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kennedy's 61-yard reception sets up GA Southern TD) 2020/9/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ragas waltzes through the defense for Louisiana TD
videos.description: Louisiana right guard O'Cyrus Torrence's blocking opens up a lane for Trey Ragas who rushes for the 10-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ragas waltzes through the defense for Louisiana TD) 2020/9/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: GA Southern cashes in on spectacular one-handed TD grab, 2-point conversion
videos.description: Georgia Southern's Khaleb Hood snags a 28-yard touchdown pass from Shai Werts in the end zone with one hand. Then Werts escapes a sack to pass to Darion Anderson for the two-point conversion to take the lead with under a minute left.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (GA Southern cashes in on spectacular one-handed TD grab, 2-point conversion) 2020/9/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: GA Southern fumbles game-tying TD out of the end zone
videos.description: Beau Johnson loses the ball as he crosses the goal line, resulting in a Louisiana touchback.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (GA Southern fumbles game-tying TD out of the end zone) 2020/9/26 ESHEET
